if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
cg.grp_cd LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
cg.grp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_comp_group cg WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT
created_at, updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_comp_group cg WHERE cg.grp_cd = #{grpCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_comp_group ( grp_cd, grp_nm, grp_odr, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{grpCd}, #{grpNm}, #{grpOdr}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_comp_group SET grp_cd = #{grpCd}, grp_nm = #{grpNm}, grp_odr = #{grpOdr}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE grp_cd = #{grpCd}
